perturbation.original_text: The Company represents and warrants to JANA that this Agreement has been duly authorized, executed and delivered by the Company, and is a valid and binding obligation of the Company, enforceable against the Company in accordance with its terms.
perturbation.changed_text: The Company represents and warrants to JANA that this Agreement has been duly authorized, executed and delivered by the Company. While the Company intends to honor this agreement, unforeseen circumstances may prevent its strict enforcement, and therefore the enforceability against the Company is not guaranteed.
perturbation.explanation: The original text states the agreement is 'enforceable against the Company in accordance with its terms,' implying a firm commitment. The added sentence introduces uncertainty by suggesting enforceability is not guaranteed due to 'unforeseen circumstances.' This contradicts the initial warranty and creates ambiguity about the Company's obligations. This contradict Section 11(a), since it is now uncertatin that the parties hereto shall be entitled to seek an injunction or injunctions to prevent breaches of this Agreement and to enforce specifically the terms and provisions of this Agreement, in addition to any other remedy to which they are entitled at law or in equity.
perturbation.contradicted_text: (a) In furtherance and not in limitation of Section 11(b), the parties hereto shall be entitled to seek an injunction or injunctions to prevent breaches of this Agreement and to enforce specifically the terms and provisions of this Agreement, in addition to any other remedy to which they are entitled at law or in equity. FURTHERMORE, EACH OF THE PARTIES HERETO (A) IRREVOCABLY WAIVES THE RIGHT TO TRIAL BY JURY AND (B) AGREES TO WAIVE ANY BONDING REQUIREMENT UNDER ANY APPLICABLE LAW, IN THE CASE ANY OTHER PARTY SEEKS TO ENFORCE THE TERMS BY WAY OF EQUITABLE RELIEF. THIS AGREEMENT SHALL BE GOVERNED IN ALL RESPECTS, INCLUDING VALIDITY, INTERPRETATION AND EFFECT, BY THE LAWS OF THE STATE OF DELAWARE WITHOUT GIVING EFFECT TO THE CHOICE OF LAW PRINCIPLES OF SUCH STATE.
perturbation.justification: The changed text introduces uncertainty about the enforceability of the agreement against the Company, stating that 'unforeseen circumstances may prevent its strict enforcement'. This directly contradicts the original warranty and the contradicted text, Section 11(a), which explicitly states that 'the parties hereto shall be entitled to seek an injunction or injunctions to prevent breaches of this Agreement and to enforce specifically the terms and provisions of this Agreement'. The 'not guaranteed' enforceability introduced in the changed text clashes with the unequivocal entitlement to seek injunctive relief in Section 11(a), thus creating a clear and direct contradiction.

perturbation.original_text: The Company agrees that if any of the JANA Nominees resigns as a director or otherwise refuses to or is unable to serve as a director at any time prior to the 2015 Annual Meeting, including as a result of death or disability, JANA shall be entitled to designate a replacement director who shall be independent of JANA, would be considered an independent director of the Company under Section 303A of the New York Stock Exchange's Listed Company Manual, is reasonably acceptable to the Board as a replacement director and has a comparable amount of business experience, although such experience need not be in the same industry or industries, and is in equally good standing in all material respects, as the JANA Nominee being replaced.
perturbation.changed_text: The Company agrees that if any of the JANA Nominees resigns as a director or otherwise refuses to or is unable to serve as a director at any time prior to the 2015 Annual Meeting, including as a result of death or disability, the Company may consider allowing JANA to designate a replacement director. However, the final decision rests solely with the Company, and the replacement need not necessarily be independent of JANA, nor meet any specific experience requirements.
perturbation.explanation: The original text unequivocally states JANA 'shall be entitled to designate a replacement director' if certain conditions are met. The revised text introduces uncertainty by saying the Company 'may consider allowing' a replacement but reserves the 'final decision' and relaxes the independence and experience criteria. This weakens JANA's right to designate a replacement and directly contradicts the original obligation of the company. The original language gives JANA a right, the new language makes it permissive, and dependent on company approval, contradicting the previous section where the company agrees to allow it, it creates an in-text contradiction in the location where the perturbation was added.
perturbation.contradicted_text: The Company agrees that if any of the JANA Nominees resigns as a director or otherwise refuses to or is unable to serve as a director at any time prior to the 2015 Annual Meeting, including as a result of death or disability, the Company may consider allowing JANA to designate a replacement director. However, the final decision rests solely with the Company, and the replacement need not necessarily be independent of JANA, nor meet any specific experience requirements. For the avoidance of doubt, the substitute director shall thereafter be deemed a JANA Nominee for purposes of this Agreement and be entitled to the same rights and subject to the same requirements under this Agreement applicable to the resigning JANA Nominee prior to his or her resignation, and such person shall be appointed to the Board to serve the unexpired term, if any, of such JANA Nominee.
perturbation.justification: The changed text significantly alters the original agreement regarding JANA's right to designate a replacement director. The original text uses mandatory language ('shall be entitled'), while the changed text introduces discretion for the Company ('may consider allowing'). Furthermore, the changed text relaxes the independence and experience criteria for the replacement, directly contradicting the original requirements. This creates a clear in-text contradiction because the Company's obligation to accept a JANA-designated replacement under specific conditions is replaced with a discretionary option. The contradicted text, being the same as the Changed Text, further reinforces the contradiction as it is internally inconsistent.

perturbation.original_text: During the Cooperation Period, JANA shall cause all shares of the Company's capital stock ("Shares") beneficially owned, directly or indirectly, by it, or by any of its Affiliates or Associates (including without limitation all Shares beneficially owned as of the respective record dates for the 2014 Annual Meeting and as of the record dates for any special meeting of shareholders) over which it exercises or has voting authority, to be present for quorum purposes and to be voted, at such meetings or at any adjournments or postponements thereof, in favor of the current members of the Board (including the JANA Nominees) that will be up for election at such meetings, and not to submit any proposal for consideration at, or bring any other business before, the 2014 Annual Meeting or initiate, encourage or participate in any "withhold" or similar campaign with respect to the election of directors at the 2014 Annual Meeting and shall not permit any of its Affiliates or Associates to do any of the foregoing or publicly or privately encourage or support any other stockholder to take any such actions.
perturbation.changed_text: During the Cooperation Period, JANA shall use its best efforts to cause all shares of the Company's capital stock ("Shares") beneficially owned, directly or indirectly, by it, or by any of its Affiliates or Associates (including without limitation all Shares beneficially owned as of the respective record dates for the 2014 Annual Meeting and as of the record dates for any special meeting of shareholders) over which it exercises or has voting authority, to be present for quorum purposes and to be voted, at such meetings or at any adjournments or postponements thereof, in favor of the current members of the Board (including the JANA Nominees) that will be up for election at such meetings, but JANA reserves the right to abstain from voting on matters it deems detrimental to shareholder value. JANA agrees not to submit any proposal for consideration at, or bring any other business before, the 2014 Annual Meeting or initiate, encourage or participate in any "withhold" or similar campaign with respect to the election of directors at the 2014 Annual Meeting and shall not permit any of its Affiliates or Associates to do any of the foregoing or publicly or privately encourage or support any other stockholder to take any such actions.
perturbation.explanation: The original text mandates that JANA 'shall cause' all shares to be voted in favor of the Board. The added phrase 'but JANA reserves the right to abstain from voting on matters it deems detrimental to shareholder value' contradicts this absolute obligation. It introduces a subjective exception allowing JANA to abstain, undermining the commitment to vote in favor of the Board. This create an in-text contradiction. Since the text originaly was creating an obligation to cause the shares to be voted in favor of the board but the modified version, introduce a 'but' where jana reserves the right to abstain.
perturbation.contradicted_text: During the Cooperation Period, JANA shall use its best efforts to cause all shares of the Company's capital stock ("Shares") beneficially owned, directly or indirectly, by it, or by any of its Affiliates or Associates (including without limitation all Shares beneficially owned as of the respective record dates for the 2014 Annual Meeting and as of the record dates for any special meeting of shareholders) over which it exercises or has voting authority, to be present for quorum purposes and to be voted, at such meetings or at any adjournments or postponements thereof, in favor of the current members of the Board (including the JANA Nominees) that will be up for election at such meetings, but JANA reserves the right to abstain from voting on matters it deems detrimental to shareholder value. JANA agrees not to submit any proposal for consideration at, or bring any other business before, the 2014 Annual Meeting or initiate, encourage or participate in any "withhold" or similar campaign with respect to the election of directors at the 2014 Annual Meeting and shall not permit any of its Affiliates or Associates to do any of the foregoing or publicly or privately encourage or support any other stockholder to take any such actions.
perturbation.justification: The original text states that JANA 'shall cause' all shares to be voted in favor of the Board. The changed text adds 'but JANA reserves the right to abstain from voting on matters it deems detrimental to shareholder value'. This creates a direct contradiction because the 'shall cause' implies a mandatory action, while the reservation of the right to abstain introduces a discretionary exception, undermining the initial commitment and creating a conflict between a mandatory obligation and a discretionary option. The contradicted text and changed text are the same in this instance, so there is a direct contradiction within the text itself after the modification.
